user.description: Enter the IP address of your Tempurpedic adjustable base. For a split king, add this integration twice — once per side.

data_description.name: A friendly label for this side (e.g. "Master Bedroom Left"). Used as the device name in Home Assistant.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the bed. Check the IP address and ensure the bed is powered on and connected to WiFi.

init.description: Calibrate position tracking. Start from flat, hold the section up until it stops, then read the tick count from the sensor. Enter 0 to leave a section uncalibrated (position shows as unknown).

data_description.head_max_ticks: Tick count from flat to maximum head elevation.
data_description.leg_max_ticks: Tick count from flat to maximum leg elevation.
